series_metadata.series_description: Account records that include monthly statements, payment history, transactions, and account reconciliations.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Shall be retained for 5 years and purged 5 years after account is closed. Records shall not be archived. ; Paper: Shall be retained for 5 years and purged 5 years after account is closed. Records shall not be archived., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
